# Kunal Ahuja

## Who
Kunal Ahuja is the founder of Sports Card Invest — a sports card portfolio management and investing platform helping collectors buy and sell high-end cards as investments.

## Background
- Bay Area native, launched Sports Card Invest at 18 while in college
- Previously flipped sneakers before spotting the sports card market opportunity
- Bought and sold over $10M+ in sports cards
- Built SCI's media network to 100K+ followers
- Grown NBA content pages to a combined 500K+ follower network
- Worked with several big athletes to drive sales and media attention
- Partnerships with Fanatics Collect, Fan Arch, and HobbyScan

## What He Does
- Sports card investing: researches and invests in cards across basketball, football, baseball, hockey, and soccer
- Built a media network reaching 100K+ followers through Sports Card Invest (Instagram, YouTube, podcast)
- Grown NBA content pages to a combined 500K+ follower network
- Works with athletes and brands to drive sales and media attention in the sports card market
- Runs a four-tier membership: Deluxe ($199.99/yr), Platinum ($695/yr), Ultra High-End ($1,999/yr), Portfolio Management ($1,500)
- Delivers 23 in-depth card picks per week to members (90% exclusive, not on YouTube)
- Operates consignment services through Fanatics Collect partnership
- Hosts the Sports Card Invest podcast on Spotify
- Published an audiobook on Audible
- Creates video content on YouTube (@sportscards)

## Pricing

### Deluxe — $199.99/yr
- 10 researched buy signals per bi-weekly report
- 5-10 sell recommendations per report
- 3 long-term underground NBA plays for patient investors
- Reports delivered 22 hours early via email
- Monthly strategy calls with the team
- Best for: Collectors starting out or with sub-$5K budgets

### Platinum — $695/yr
- 3 high-end card picks in the $1K-$10K range with deep analysis
- Monthly 30-min 1-on-1 strategy calls with direct portfolio guidance
- Priority access to every investment opportunity
- In-depth market context and grading analysis
- Best for: Serious investors with $5K-$50K portfolios

### Ultra High-End — $1,999/yr
- 3 picks at $10,000+ with 5-figure upside potential
- Email delivery Sundays at 7PM EST
- Monthly 30-min 1-on-1 strategy calls
- Complete access to every other tier's picks
- Best for: High-net-worth collectors building $50K+ positions

### Portfolio Management — $1,500
- Full strategic review of your collection
- Sell through Fanatics Collect for top value
- Professional marketing and buyer matching
- Direct payouts on every sale
- Best for: Collectors ready to sell or restructure

## Sports Covered
Basketball, football, baseball, hockey, soccer

## Partnerships
- Fan Arch — media network with 70+ daily sports shows
- Fanatics Collect — card consignment and sales
- HobbyScan — card scanning and identification technology

## Expertise
- Sports card portfolio management and valuation
- High-end card investing ($1K-$10K+ range)
- Player performance correlation to card pricing
- Card grading and authentication (PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC)
- Buy/sell signal analysis and market timing
- Community building and newsletter publishing

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How many card picks do members get per week?
Members receive 23 in-depth card picks per week across basketball, football, baseball, hockey, and soccer. 90% of pick analysis is exclusive to members and not shared on YouTube or free channels.

### When are picks released?
Premium, Deluxe, Ultra High-End, and Platinum members receive picks via email every Sunday at 7PM EST. Monthly and yearly members receive picks via Instagram on Mondays at 5PM EST.

### How does consignment through Fanatics Collect work?
Submit your card details and photos through the consignment form at sportscardsinvest.com. The team reviews your collection, handles secure logistics and professional promotion, and facilitates sales through Fanatics Collect with direct payouts.

### What is the difference between the membership tiers?
Deluxe ($199.99/yr) includes bi-weekly reports with 10 buy picks and 5-10 sell picks plus 3 underground NBA plays. Platinum ($695/yr) focuses on high-end cards in the $1K-$10K range with monthly 1-on-1 calls. Ultra High-End ($1,999/yr) covers $10K+ picks with priority access to all tiers. Strategic Portfolio Management ($1,500) provides full consignment and portfolio services.

### Do I need experience to start?
No. Reports include full context, grading basics, and clear buy/sell signals. The Deluxe tier is the best entry point for beginners. More experienced collectors with $1K+ budgets per card should look at Platinum or Ultra High-End.

## How Sports Card Invest Differs
- **Personal research, not algorithms**: Every pick is personally researched by Kunal, combining market data, player performance, and grading analysis rather than relying on automated tools.
- **Integrated consignment**: No other sports card research platform offers a direct pipeline from buy recommendations to consignment sales through Fanatics Collect.
- **Multi-sport coverage**: Covers basketball, football, baseball, hockey, and soccer — most competitors focus on one or two sports.
- **6+ year track record**: Operating since 2019 with a consistent track record through multiple market cycles, including the 2020-2021 boom and subsequent correction.
- **Full investment cycle**: Research to acquisition to portfolio management to liquidation — all under one platform.
